name: AREthEstablishTCPConnection
title: AREthEstablishTCPConnection
description: Establishes one or multiple database defined TCP connection(s).
A TCP connection can be closed using the AREthCloseEstablishedTCPConnection function.

parameters.name: aepHandle
parameters.description: Source application endpoint, which initiates the connection(s).Has to be defined in the database.
